raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.2":"The section contains at least one materially questionable logical claim (that conjugacy 'is a common case' without qualification) and a notable gap (the user is silently not warned when the transformation is skipped); logical review could be a primary task.","R1.3":"Experimental results are cited (17/23 models, 1.2×–18× speedup, median 3.4×) with no link to figures or tables; verifying that these numbers are accurately represented and adequately supported could be load-bearing.","R1.6":"'Help me with this section' most commonly signals a writing-improvement request; sentence-level polish and paragraph coherence could be the sole intended task."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should I focus primarily on improving the prose and sentence-level writing quality of this section, or on reviewing the technical and logical soundness of its claims and experimental evidence (e.g., the conjugacy assumption, the silent suppression of user warnings, the benchmark figures)?"}

rationale.R1.2: The section contains at least one materially questionable logical claim (that conjugacy 'is a common case' without qualification) and a notable gap (the user is silently not warned when the transformation is skipped); logical review could be a primary task.
rationale.R1.3: Experimental results are cited (17/23 models, 1.2×–18× speedup, median 3.4×) with no link to figures or tables; verifying that these numbers are accurately represented and adequately supported could be load-bearing.
rationale.R1.6: 'Help me with this section' most commonly signals a writing-improvement request; sentence-level polish and paragraph coherence could be the sole intended task.

parsed.clarification_question: Should I focus primarily on improving the prose and sentence-level writing quality of this section, or on reviewing the technical and logical soundness of its claims and experimental evidence (e.g., the conjugacy assumption, the silent suppression of user warnings, the benchmark figures)?
